---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What user, contributor or operational problem should this solve?

## Proposal

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Affected Areas

List services, Kafka topics, dashboards, APIs or docs likely to change.

## Notes

Mention compatibility, migration or observability impact if known.
